questions.question: Explain the main difference between a wired network and a wireless network, focusing on transmission media.
questions.hint: Describe the characteristics of guided and unguided media

questions.question: Describe the role of the Physical Layer in the OSI model and explain the differences between guided and unguided media.
questions.hint: Focus on the transmission media and the OSI model

questions.question: A computer network uses a combination of wired and wireless transmission media. Describe the advantages and disadvantages of using both types of transmission media in a network.
questions.hint: Compare and contrast the use of guided and unguided media
